title: Lunge Launch
description: Auto-deploy your elytra when you use a Lunge spear mid-jump for even smoother movement tech.
body:
--- ## ⚔️ Lunge Launch Lunge Launch activates your elytra when you use a spear enchanted with Lunge while airborne. Perfect for useing a spear to move around with elytra. ### ✨ Features - **Auto Elytra Glide** You don’t need to press space, just attack in the air with a Lunge-enchanted spear. - **Works With Any Spear** - **Only Activates When:** - You have an elytra equipped - You’re in the air - You’re useing a spear with Lunge

--- ## ⚙️ Configuration Configuration support is planned for future releases using ModMenu and Cloth Config. ### Settings (Coming Soon) - **Activation Delay** Set the delay in milliseconds between attack button press and elytra activation _(default: 0ms - instant)_ --- ## 🔗 Dependencies ### Required ### Optional (Recommended)
